title: Add reusable coverage badge workflow and documentation

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting implementation: add reusable workflow to compute/update coverage badge from a CI artifact and document caller setup in README.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented reusable coverage badge workflow and docs updates. Added .github/workflows/coverage-badge-reusable.yml (workflow_call) to download a caller CI coverage artifact, generate coverage_badge.json from totals.percent_covered, and push badge updates with anthusbot credentials. Updated README.md with setup, inputs, required secret, and caller examples.
